highlights.description: GradientSHAP explainer - Expected Gradients method using numerical differentiation
Confidence intervals for sampling-based SHAP methods with configurable confidence levels
CatBoost model support - parse CatBoost JSON models for TreeSHAP
ONNX-ML TreeEnsemble parser - load tree models directly from ONNX format
Parallel batch explanation API - explain multiple instances efficiently across workers
Multi-class classification example demonstrating per-class SHAP explanations
PartitionSHAP explainer - hierarchical Owen values for feature groupings
AdditiveSHAP explainer - exact SHAP for Generalized Additive Models (GAMs)
Background data selection guide for optimal baseline computation

added.description: GradientSHAP explainer (`explainer/gradient`) with Expected Gradients algorithm
Numerical gradient computation using central finite differences
GradientSHAP configuration options (WithEpsilon, WithNoiseStdev, WithLocalSmoothing)
Confidence intervals for SamplingSHAP, PermutationSHAP, and GradientSHAP via `WithConfidenceLevel()`
ConfidenceIntervals type in explanation package with Lower, Upper, StandardErrors
GetConfidenceInterval() and HasConfidenceIntervals() helper methods
ZScoreForConfidenceLevel() helper for common confidence levels (90%, 95%, 99%)
CatBoost JSON model parser (`ParseCatBoostJSON`, `LoadCatBoostModel`)
Support for CatBoost oblivious (symmetric) trees with float and categorical features
ONNX-ML TreeEnsemble parser (`ParseONNXTreeEnsemble`, `ParseONNXTreeEnsembleFromBytes`)
Support for TreeEnsembleRegressor and TreeEnsembleClassifier ONNX-ML operators
ExplainBatchParallel() generic parallel batch function for any explainer
ExplainBatchWithProgress() batch function with progress callback
BatchConfig with Workers and StopOnError options
Multi-class classification example (`examples/multiclass`)
GradientSHAP example (`examples/gradientshap`)
PartitionSHAP explainer (`explainer/partition`) with hierarchical Owen values
Node type for defining feature hierarchies
Flat mode fallback when no hierarchy is provided
AdditiveSHAP explainer (`explainer/additive`) for Generalized Additive Models
Exact SHAP computation for additive models with O(n×b) complexity
Background data selection guide (`docs/guides/background-data.md`)
`WithBatchedPredictions()` config option for efficient batched model inference
Batched coalition evaluation in KernelSHAP, ExactSHAP, and PartitionSHAP

tests.description: GradientSHAP tests (linear, nonlinear, parallel, confidence intervals, gradient accuracy)

Confidence interval tests for sampling and permutation explainers
CatBoost parser tests (simple, single leaf, multiple trees, depth 3, categorical)

Parallel batch tests (basic, progress, error handling, context cancellation)
PartitionSHAP tests (hierarchy validation, local accuracy, flat mode, batch)
ONNX graph parsing tests with protobuf model construction
Additional activation session tests for helper methods
Batched prediction tests for KernelSHAP, ExactSHAP, and PartitionSHAP
AdditiveSHAP tests (linear, nonlinear, single feature, batch, error handling)
